KCII-IOS# show running-config

! running
version 17.9
service password-encryption
hostname KCII-IOS-SIM
enable secret 9 [HASHED_ENABLE_SECRET]
username [USER_ADMIN] privilege 15 secret 9 [HASHED_USER_SECRET]
banner motd ^C[AUTHORIZED_ACCESS_ONLY]^C
logging host [LOG_SERVER]
ntp server [NTP_SERVER]
ip ssh version 2
ip access-list standard MGMT-ACL
 permit [MGMT_NET] [WILDCARD]
line vty 0 4
 access-class MGMT-ACL in
 exec-timeout 10 0
 login local
 transport input ssh
snmp-server community [COMMUNITY_COMPLEX] RO MGMT-ACL
no ip http server
no ip bootp server
no cdp run
end

KCII-IOS# show startup-config

! startup
version 17.9
service password-encryption
hostname KCII-IOS-SIM
enable secret 9 [HASHED_ENABLE_SECRET]
username [USER_ADMIN] privilege 15 secret 9 [HASHED_USER_SECRET]
banner motd ^C[AUTHORIZED_ACCESS_ONLY]^C
logging host [LOG_SERVER]
ntp server [NTP_SERVER]
ip ssh version 2
ip access-list standard MGMT-ACL
 permit [MGMT_NET] [WILDCARD]
line vty 0 4
 access-class MGMT-ACL in
 exec-timeout 10 0
 login local
 transport input ssh
snmp-server community [COMMUNITY_COMPLEX] RO MGMT-ACL
no ip http server
no ip bootp server
no cdp run
end

KCII-IOS# show version

Cisco IOS Software, KCII Simulator
Compiled by kcii-netlab-sim
ROM: Bootstrap program is KCII simulator
Processor board ID [SERIAL_1]

KCII-IOS# show ip interface brief

Interface              IP-Address      OK? Method Status                Protocol
GigabitEthernet0/0     unassigned      YES unset  up                    up
GigabitEthernet0/1     unassigned      YES unset  administratively down down

KCII-IOS# show users

Line       User       Host(s)              Idle       Location
*  2 vty 0     [USER_ADMIN] idle                 00:00:00   [MGMT_HOST]

KCII-IOS# show line

Tty Line Typ     Tx/Rx     A Modem  Roty AccO AccI  Uses  Noise Overruns Int
  0    0 CTY              -    -      -    -    -     0      0     0/0       -
  2    2 VTY              -    -      -    -    -     1      0     0/0       -

KCII-IOS# show logging

Syslog logging: enabled
    Logging to [LOG_SERVER]

KCII-IOS# show ntp status

Clock is synchronized, stratum 3, reference is [NTP_SERVER]

KCII-IOS# show snmp

SNMP agent enabled
Community strings are configured with restricted ACLs

KCII-IOS# show ip ssh

SSH Enabled - version 2.0
Authentication methods: publickey,password

KCII-IOS# show access-lists

Standard IP access list MGMT-ACL
    10 permit [MGMT_NET] [WILDCARD]
